sections.heading:
Stop Wasting Hours.
Book Smarter with Altovia.
sections.subheading: One app. Cheap flights, business class deals, AI trip planning, and points optimization — all from your phone. No more 12-tab rabbit holes.

sections.heading: Why Altovia Hits Different
sections.subheading: Other apps give you results. Altovia gives you answers.

items.title: Insane Flight Deals — Fast
items.description: Find cheap flights anywhere in the world in seconds. Altovia searches across major airlines so you don't have to. First class and business class deals included — not just economy.

items.title: AI That Plans Like a Local
items.description: Tell Altovia where you're going and it researches local experiences, hidden gems, and things to do — like you've got a well-traveled bestie on speed dial.

items.title: Say Bye to Tab Hell
items.description: Remember spending days across multiple tabs, multiple windows, multiple apps just to book one trip? Altovia does all of that in a couple of taps. Seriously.

items.title: Points? Actually Used
items.description: Altovia spots the award seats and business class redemptions you'd miss on your own. Connect your loyalty programs and let the AI do the math.

items.title: Your Personal Travel Agent
items.description: Not sure what to do next? Altovia's AI plans your whole trip — flights, activities, local tips — like a travel agent that actually knows your taste.

items.title: Deals From the US & Canada
items.description: Amazing fares on most major airlines departing from the United States and Canada. Premium cabin upgrades, budget escapes, weekend getaways — all in one place.

sections.heading: Real Trips. Real Savings.
sections.subheading: People who switched from Kayak, Google Flights, and all the rest.

items.quote: I used to have like 15 tabs open every time I booked a flight. Altovia found me a business class seat to Tokyo for less than what I was paying for economy on other apps. I'm not going back.
items.author: Jessica M.

items.quote: The AI trip planner is unreal. I told it I wanted to go to Lisbon for a week on a budget and it gave me a full itinerary with local spots I never would've found. Like having a friend who's been everywhere.
items.author: Marcus T.

items.quote: I actually like collecting points — but Altovia shows me redemptions I would've completely missed. Got a first class flight to Paris using miles I forgot I had. The app basically paid for itself.
items.author: Priya S.

sections.heading: Your Best Trip Yet Starts Here.
sections.description: Download Altovia free. Start your trial with full access to AI trip planning, cheap flight search, and points optimization. No credit card. No stress.

sections.heading: Got Questions?
sections.subheading: Real talk about how Altovia compares.

items.question: How is Altovia different from Google Flights or Kayak?
items.answer: Google Flights and Kayak are search tools — you fill out forms and scroll results. Altovia is your travel AI: you describe what you want, and it searches, plans, and optimizes for you. It handles flights, hotels, activities, points, and local tips in one app — no switching required.

items.question: I can find cheap flights myself — why do I need Altovia?
items.answer: Totally fair. But most people spend hours across multiple sites, miss better deals, and never actually use their points. Altovia does all of that in minutes — and spots deals (especially first class and business class) that are way harder to find manually.

items.question: What if I actually like looking for points deals?
items.answer: Altovia is built for you then. Connect your loyalty programs and it surfaces the best award redemptions across all your accounts — the ones that actually make sense. You still call the shots; Altovia just makes sure you see every option.

items.question: Is this just another app I won't use?
items.answer: We get it — app fatigue is real. But Altovia replaces 4-5 things you already do separately (flight search, price alerts, trip planning, points tracking). It's less apps, not more.

items.question: Is Altovia free?
items.answer: Yes — free to download with a 7-day trial of all Pro features. No credit card needed to start. After that, pick a plan that works for how often you travel.
